scope: AgenC composer ↔ openclaude src/components/PromptInput/* wholesale port — DOCUMENTED NON-VIABLE for the integrating files. AgenC's composer is preserved; only the transitive utility shims that other ported areas (search, diagnostics) consumed are added here.

requiredBehaviors: openclaude src/components/PromptInput/PromptInput.tsx and its 17 transitive hook deps integrate with openclaude product runtime that has no AgenC counterpart: BridgeDialog + bridgeEnabled + bridgeStatusUtil; CompanionSprite + buddy/feature + useBuddyNotification; commands/fast/fast + commands.ts + commands/review/ultrareviewEnabled + commands/terminalSetup; AutoModeOptInDialog + AutoUpdaterWrapper; QueuedMessageContext + voice context + promptOverlayContext; CoordinatorAgentStatus + EffortIndicator + FastIcon; useApiKeyVerification + useCommandQueue + useDoublePress + useIdeConnectionStatus + useIdeSelection + useInputBuffer + useMainLoopModel + usePromptSuggestion + usePrStatus + useTasksV2.

AgenC composer (Composer.tsx, ComposerBuffer.tsx, drafts.ts, history.ts, palette-sources.ts, Palette.tsx, paste-store.ts, promptInput-utils.ts, plus the AgenC-shape PromptInput*.tsx, HistorySearchInput, IssueFlagBanner, Notifications, ShimmeredInput, useMaybeTruncateInput, usePromptInputPlaceholder, useShowFastIconHint, useSwarmBanner, VoiceIndicator) integrates with AgenC's session model, palette, draft store, paste store, history.

Replacing AgenC composer wholesale would require porting openclaude's bridge/buddy/IDE/ultrareview/AutoMode product runtime — out of scope. AgenC composer is preserved; openclaude composer behavior parity at the visible-UX layer is already partially locked by openclaude-tui-core-matrix at the transcript level.

What WAS added by this contract: small utility shims (utils/env.ts, utils/array.ts, utils/stringUtils.ts, utils/slowOperations.ts) plus extended history.ts (getPastedTextRefNumLines) + extended config-shim.ts (editorMode) consumed by other wholesale-ported areas (search, keybindings).
